The '''''True Justice''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prison [[Starship/Legends|ship]], which was used to hold trials for political prisoners in space, rather than on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which might potentially support the prisoners.

In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], the ''True Justice'' captured and held [[Roan Lands]] and [[Dona Telamark]] for trial. However, [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]], [[Trever Flume]], and [[Oryon]] managed to rescue them by impersonating the courtroom officers and proving the two as innocent. Then, they took over the cockpit and stole the ship for their uses.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]''
